title: Crispy French Show Fritters
description: A simple and delicious dessert made with crumbly French show. Perfect for any occasion.
instructions: Preheat oil in a deep frying pan to 375°F (190°C).
In a mixing bowl, combine crumbly French show, sugar, and cinnamon.
Add vodka to the mixture and stir until combined.
Using a spoon, carefully drop small amounts of the mixture into the hot oil.
Fry the French show fritters for 2-3 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove the fritters from the oil with a slotted spoon and place on a paper towel-lined plate.
